remarks: Bright, spacious, and move-in ready! This well-maintained rental features an oversized living room with wall-to-wall carpeting and abundant natural light. Bedrooms offer generous closet space, including a primary with a full wall of closets.  The updated kitchen boasts a gas range, all-new appliances, and quartz countertops for style and efficiency. A full bathroom with tub adds everyday convenience.  On-site laundry in the basement is easy with app-based washers and dryers.  Conveniently located near shopping, dining, major commuter routes, and just minutes to I-95, on the outskirts of downtown Stamford.    Select photos have been virtually staged to showcase layout and potential.
